title: The Goa, Daman and Diu (Extension of the Code of Civil Procedure and the Arbitration Act) Act, 1965
full_text: The Goa, Daman and Diu (Extension of the Code of Civil Procedure and the Arbitration Act) Act, 1965 गोवा, दमण और दीव (सिविल प्रक्रियासंहिता और माध्‍यस्‍थम् अधिनियम का विस्‍तारण) अधिनियम, 1965 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196530 Act Number: 30 Enactment Date: 1965-09-25 Act Year: 1965 Short Title: The Goa, Daman and Diu (Extension of the Code of Civil Procedure and the Arbitration Act) Act, 1965 Hindi Title: गोवा, दमण और दीव (सिविल प्रक्रियासंहिता और माध्‍यस्‍थम् अधिनियम का विस्‍तारण) अधिनियम, 1965 Long Title: An Act to provide for the extension of the Code of Civil Procedure, 1908, and the Arbitration Act, 1940, to the Union territory of Goa, Daman and Diu and for certain other matters. Ministry: Ministry of Law and Justice Department: Legislative Department Enforcement Date: 15-06-1966 Notification: 15th, June, 1966, vide notification No. S.O. 1597(E), dated 24th, June, 1966, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary Part II, sec. 3(ii). TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Goa, Daman and Diu (Extension of the Code of Civil Procedure and the Arbitration Act) Act, 1965 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Extension of Code of Civil Procedure and Arbitration Act, 1940, to Goa, Daman and Diu. Section 4. Repeal and saving. Section 5. Rules of construction. Section 6. Power to remove Difficulties. Section 7. Consequential provisions.
